title: Decision Tree Induction, Validation, and Pruning Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the complete lifecycle of building a decision tree model, from induction using an algorithm to the validation and pruning steps to prevent overfitting.
elements: Decision Tree Induction Algorithm (e.g., ID3, C4.5, CART)
relationships: Algorithm processes Training Dataset to generate a Full Tree
Full Tree is evaluated on Validation Dataset to assess overfitting
Pruning Algorithm simplifies Full Tree based on validation performance
Resulting Pruned Tree is final model for prediction on new data
